# tenableio_agent_groups (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of agent groups from Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `agents_count` (Number)
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `owner` (String)
- `owner_id` (Number)
- `shared` (Number)
